issues.title: Double tasks generated for Loan Simple leads in post-referral workflow
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were receiving duplicate tasks in the post-referral workflow. The issue was caused by a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. HubSpot support was engaged and the issue was resolved.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or delete the duplicate tasks.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-enrolling deals that flip back to Offer Accepted after a stage reversal
issues.desc: When a deal was set to Offer Accepted, reverted to a prior stage (e.g., Committed/Referred Active), and then moved back to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger. The root cause was that 'deal stage = Offer Accepted' was not listed as a re-enrollment criterion in the workflow. The re-enrollment criterion was added to fix this going forward.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that flipped back to Offer Accepted during the impact window and did not receive TC tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks firing for deals marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs were receiving post-referral workflow check-in tasks for deals that had already been marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow was not properly suppressing or unenrolling deals upon reaching these terminal statuses. A filter tweak was made to correct the suppression logic.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any erroneous check-in tasks received for deals already marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Automated email to agent showing incorrect loan officer after LO change
issues.desc: After a loan officer was updated on a deal, the automated agent-facing emails continued to reference the previous LO instead of the newly assigned one. The issue affected at least one deal where the LO was changed from Paul to Julie Yocum. The fix was applied by Luis on the product side.
issues.workaround: For any deals where an LO change occurred during the impact window, manually send the agent introduction email with the correct LO information.

issues.title: MRC Offer Accepted deals not enrolling into TC workflow tasks
issues.desc: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering TC workflow enrollment or task creation. The issue was escalated to HubSpot support, which identified a platform-level problem. HubSpot support confirmed the issue was resolved after the ticket was raised.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals marked Offer Accepted during the impact window into the TC workflow to ensure closing tasks are generated.
